pr.title: 10L Mixed Precision: val_bpb=1.2129 (lower LR + fp16 embed + int6 middle)

output.summary: 10-layer transformer uses a lower LR schedule plus fp16 tied embeddings and int6 middle layers to stay under 16MB without hurting quality.
techniques: Lowered matrix, scalar, and tied-embed learning rates
Export tied embeddings in fp16 to avoid quantization loss
Apply int6 quantization on middle layers (2-7) while keeping early/late layers at int8
